summary: Grom HQ & Role Permission Hardening testing complete. All features verified: (1) Grom Parent Photo Tools shows only 'Grom Archive' - no Earnings, Bookings, Live Sessions. (2) Grom Parent Gallery has 'Grom Highlights' section with cyan gradient, NO pricing card, NO commerce features. (3) Grom Parent mobile bottom nav shows 'Grom Gear' (shopping bag) instead of Camera. (4) Unlinked Grom messaging blocked with Safety Gate (API returns 403, UI shows 'Parental Link Required'). (5) Pro-Zone check endpoint works correctly for Grom Parent. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (6 skipped due to missing admin credentials). Frontend: All UI flows verified via Playwright.

minor.issue: Admin Pro account (dpritzker0905@gmail.com) password 'Test123!' is invalid - tests skipped

critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.js getPhotoToolsItems() correctly filters by role: Grom Parent = only 'Grom Archive', Hobbyist = only 'My Gallery', Pro = full access
BottomNav.js getActionCenterConfig() correctly swaps Camera to ShoppingBag (Grom Gear) for Grom Parent
GalleryPage.js correctly hides pricing/commerce for Grom Parent and Hobbyist (canSellPhotos = false)
GalleryPage.js shows 'Grom Highlights' section with cyan gradient for Grom Parent
messages.py check_grom_messaging_permission() correctly blocks unlinked Groms (returns 403)
messages.py get_conversations() returns empty list for blocked Groms (not error)

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 passed, 6 skipped due to missing credentials)

(6) Pro-Zone check endpoint works with latitude/longitude params.
